chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S – 314 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 16.10.2024 Mr. Ghulam Ali Bozdar, Advocate holding brief on behalf of Mr. Hamayoun Shaikh, Counsel for the applicants and states that under instructions, he does not press the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. Judge ARBROHI
